Tutorials

Learn how to build amazing Shopify Fundraisers

Watch our videos to learn how to build amazing Fundraisers using Fundlet for Shopify.

Part 1: Create your First Campaign

Learn how to get started creating Fundraisers on Shopoify by creating your first campaign in Fundlet.

  • • Add name and description
  • • Upload campaign photos
  • • Set the payout and goals

Read the guide →

Part 2: Setup your Storefront

Every Fundlet campaign comes with a unique storefront to showcase the campaign and its products.

  • • Built directly into Shopify
  • • Showcase a collections
  • • Increase conversions with our product modal

Read the guide →

Part 3: Sales Walkthrough

See how Fundlet tracks and reports on sales from the point of purchase to reporting in the app.

  • • Uses Shopify discount codes
  • • Slick UI to showcase results
  • • Exportable reports

Read the guide →

Onboard Participants

Learn how to quickly onboard participants from your campaign page.

  • • Easy to use form
  • • Upload photo, name and email
  • • Shareable link

Read the guide →

Onboard Campaigns

Learn how to quickly onboard campains from your shop.

  • • Easy to use form
  • • Upload photo, content and more
  • • Embed onto any page on your site

Read the guide →

Use Discount Codes

Fundlet uses Shopify's built-in discount codes. So you can use them to expand your fundraiser past your campaign page.

  • • Shop entire site
  • • Limit use with Shopify coupon UI
  • • Apply discounts if desired

Read the guide →

Setup Custom Fields

Collect custom data (think location, team name, personalization, etc.) to Fundraiser products.

  • • Add up to 2 custom fields
  • • Open text fields and selectable options
  • • Responses flow to exportable reports

Read the guide →

Display Countdown

Learn how to show a countdown to drive urgency and boost sales.

  • • Beautifully designed countdown
  • • Easy to setup
  • • Drives urgency, creates excitement

Read the guide →

Use Existing Product Page

Learn how to use your existing product page with Fundlet

  • • Seamless integration
  • • Use existing product customizations
  • • Setup in under a minute

Read the guide →

End-to-End Walkthrough

See how to setup a fundraiser from start-to-finish with Fundlet.

  • • Full setup
  • • Great for a refresher
  • • See how fast it is to get started!

Read the guide →

Single Product Fundraiser

Learn how to create a stunning single product fundraiser.

  • • Turn any product into a fundraiser
  • • Display campaign branding
  • • Highlight campaign progress

Read the guide →

Create Custom Theme Templates

Learn how to create a custom theme template for your campaign.

  • • Unique designs per product
  • • Re-use existing designs
  • • No code needed

Read the guide →

Create Custom Payouts

Assign specific dollar amounts for each product in your campaign.

  • • Per product payouts
  • • Flexible setup with higher and lower payouts in same campaign
  • • Automatic tracking

Read the guide →

Share Campaign Dashboard

Securely give campaign organizers access to campaign details and reports

  • • Quickly share key campaign metrics
  • • Allow organizers to export reports and add participants
  • • Real-time tracking to keep everyone up-to-date

Read the guide →

Display Fundraiser on Collection Page

Learn how to use your Shopify Collection page for your Fundraiser Landing Page

  • • Use your existing collection page
  • • Show Fundraiser information and progress
  • • Track within your existing product flow

Read the guide →

Implement Payout Tiers to Boost Participation

Learn how to use payout tiers to adjust payouts based on revenue

  • • Adjust payouts based on revenue
  • • Set increases to boost participation
  • • Award high performing fundraisers

Read the guide →

Create Isolated Fundraisers

Learn how to use Fundlet to create isolated campaigns that do not share your shop's header and/or footer.

  • • Easily Remove Header and Footer
  • • Includes a custom cart
  • • Return dialog keeps visitors on your campaign

Read the guide →

Add an Existing Order to a Campaign

Learn how to add an order that was not properly tagged into a campaign

  • • Quickly fix ordering errors
  • • Add order and participant tags
  • • Works on fundraisers with the exclude filter

Read the guide →

Use Unlisted Shopify Products in your Fundraiser

Learn how to use Shopify's unlisted product status to create unique products for your fundraiser

  • • Use existing products
  • • Adjust price for fundraiser items
  • • Create items that are unique to a campaign

Read the guide →

Duplicate Campaign

Learn how to quickly duplicate a campaign in Fundlet.

  • • Bring over settings with a single click
  • • Make changes easily
  • • Makes starting a new campaign fast and accurate

Read the guide →

Password Protected Fundraisers

Learn how to make a password protected fundraiser.

  • • Make any fundraiser more private
  • • Unique passwords for each fundraiser
  • • Setup in under a minute

Read the guide →

Upload Participant CSV

Our upload participants CSV feature makes adding participants to your Shopify Fundraiser easy

  • • Upload quickly
  • • Works with standard CSV
  • • Add multiple participants fast

Read the guide →

Group Participants

Group participants to make organization and discovery easier.

  • • Organize your participants
  • • Make search easier
  • • Works for self registration

Read the guide →

Require and Search Participants

Learn how to require the selection of participants for your fundraiser.

  • • Easy to enable
  • • Enable a simple search
  • • Require the selection of participants

Read the guide →

Participants as Metaobjects

Learn how to scale participants in Fundlet using our new Metaobject feature

  • • Scales to over 200 participants
  • • More useful management UI
  • • Same great participants

Read the guide →
